title: tarenna sambucina var. oweniana
intro: Tarenna sambucina var. oweniana, also known as Owen's Tarenna or a variant of the Sambucina plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tarenna sambucina var. oweniana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
